title: Vangueriella glabrescens
taxonomy: Vangueriella glabrescens is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Vangueriella and is native to tropical Africa. The plant is a shrub or small tree that grows up to a certain height. The classification of Vangueriella glabrescens is further supported by its characteristic leaf and flower morphology. This classification is based on the plant's unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other species within the Rubiaceae family.
